metadata.description: Productivity tools for Claude Code: daily/weekly reports, session search, and timesheet

plugins.name: daily-report
plugins.description: Generate daily work reports from Claude Code session history

plugins.name: weekly-report
plugins.description: Generate weekly summary reports by aggregating daily reports or session history

plugins.name: session-search
plugins.description: Search across all Claude Code sessions by keyword

plugins.name: timesheet
plugins.description: Estimate per-project work time from Claude Code session timestamps
